LDAP server init and sidecar manager

Usage:
  ldap-manager [command]

Available Commands:
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  help        Help about any command
  init        Run as init container: create directories and hash admin password
  sidecar     Run as sidecar container: health checks and LDAP seeding

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for ldap-manager

Use "ldap-manager [command] --help" for more information about a command.
